extensionDescription.message: Xitirhisiwa xo pimanisa xa offline diff xo olova xa tsalwa na khodi.
extensionDescription.description: Description shown in the Chrome Web Store

headerSubtitle.message: Fanisa tsalwa, khodi, JSON, na swin’wana — ehandle ka inthanete

placeholderOriginal.message: Namarheta tsalwa ra masungulo kumbe khodi laha...

placeholderModified.message: Namarheta tsalwa leri cinciweke kumbe khodi laha...

emptyStateBody.message: Namarheta tsalwa eka tiphaneleni leti hatimbirhi ivi u tikhoma Compare — kutani u tshikelela Ctrl+Enter

identicalBody.message: Ku hava ku hambana loku kumiweke exikarhi ka swingheniso leswimbirhi.

errorLargeInput.message: Input yikulu swinene. Diff yi nga teka nkarhinyana...

errorBothEmpty.message: Hi kombela u namarheta leswi nga endzeni eka tiphaneleni leti hatimbirhi u nga si pimanisa.

errorOneEmpty.message: Phanele yin’we a yi na nchumu. Hi kombela u nyika swilo leswi nga endzeni eka tiphaneleni leti hatimbirhi.

formatJSONError.message: JSON leyi nga tirhiki eka phanele yin’we kumbe havumbirhi bya yona.
